sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9457" key="a)ntane/xw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνταν-έχω</orth>, <sense id="n9457.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hold up in turn</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in reply,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πυρσούς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:6:19:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.19.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:1:40:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.40.3</biblScope></bibl>, Men.Prot.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:p.72D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.72D.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
